'''mahodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaccession|deaccession]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaccession|deaccession]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mahodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæhedeth|mæhedeth]] || [[word:mæhedej|mæhedej]] || [[word:mæhedesh|mæhedesh]] || [[word:mæhede|mæhede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahohodoth|mahohodoth]] || [[word:mahohodoj|mahohodoj]] || [[word:mahohodosh|mahohodosh]] || [[word:mahohodo|mahohodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahodoth|mahodoth]] || [[word:mahodoj|mahodoj]] || [[word:mahodosh|mahodosh]] || [[word:mahodo|mahodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahofdoth|mahofdoth]] || [[word:mahofdoj|mahofdoj]] || [[word:mahofdosh|mahofdosh]] || [[word:mahofdof|mahofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mahodotho|mahodotho]] || [[word:mahodojo|mahodojo]] || [[word:mahodosho|mahodosho]] || [[word:mahodoko|mahodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mahodoth|mahodoth]] || [[word:mahodoj|mahodoj]] || [[word:mahodosh|mahodosh]] || [[word:mahodo|mahodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mahodothol|mahodothol]] || [[word:mahodojol|mahodojol]] || [[word:mahodoshol|mahodoshol]] || [[word:mahodokol|mahodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mahodothotho|mahodothotho]] || [[word:mahodojojo|mahodojojo]] || [[word:mahodoshosho|mahodoshosho]] || [[word:mahodoko|mahodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mahodothon|mahodothon]] || [[word:mahodojon|mahodojon]] || [[word:mahodoshon|mahodoshon]] || [[word:mahodokon|mahodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mahodothoro|mahodothoro]] || [[word:mahodojoro|mahodojoro]] || [[word:mahodoshoro|mahodoshoro]] || [[word:mahodokoro|mahodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
